title: PM-KISAN Samman Nidhi
eligibility: Landholding farmer families subject to scheme rules and exclusions.
benefits: Income support to eligible farmer families in instalments.
application: Apply through agriculture office, CSC, or official agriculture portal with land and bank details.

title: Udyogini Scheme for Women Entrepreneurs
eligibility: Women applicants seeking support for small business activities, subject to category and income conditions.
benefits: Financial support and subsidized credit for women entrepreneurship.
application: Apply via women and child development or partner financial institutions in Karnataka.
grievance_office: District Women and Child Development Office

title: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
eligibility: Eligible Bihar students pursuing higher studies subject to official rules.
benefits: Education loan assistance for higher education.
application: Apply through the Bihar government student credit portal or district registration center.

title: Public Distribution System Grievance Support
eligibility: Citizens facing ration card delays, delivery issues, or correction problems.
benefits: Guidance for grievance filing and local office routing.
application: Raise complaint through district food office or state food and civil supplies portal.
grievance_office: District Food and Civil Supplies Office

title: Delhi e-District Citizen Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Delhi seeking government certificates and service requests.
benefits: Single-window digital service access for common citizen applications.
application: Apply through Delhi e-District portal for certificates, welfare services, and status checks.

title: Maharashtra Aaple Sarkar Service Guidance
eligibility: Maharashtra residents applying for state digital services and certificates.
benefits: Unified access to service applications and local office workflows.
application: Use the Maharashtra citizen services portal and district offices for assisted filing.

title: UP eSathi Services Guidance
eligibility: Residents of Uttar Pradesh requiring digital public service applications.
benefits: Faster access to state-level certificates and service requests.
application: Submit service requests through the UP state portal and district facilitation centers.
